sources.name: Northern Territory Legislation (legislation.nt.gov.au)
sources.notes: Northern Territory Legislation at legislation.nt.gov.au. All NT Acts and subordinate legislation in force, historical versions, Bills, amendment history. Full text HTML, free access. AustLII also mirr

sources.name: Tasmania Legislation Online (legislation.tas.gov.au)
sources.notes: Tasmanian Legislation Online at legislation.tas.gov.au. Free public access to all Tasmanian Acts in consolidated form from 1997 onward; Statutory Rules from 1998 onward. HTML access. Also mirrored by

sources.name: Western Australia Legislation (WALW)
sources.notes: Western Australian Legislation Website (WALW) at legislation.wa.gov.au. Maintained by State Law Publisher. Current and point-in-time consolidations of WA Acts and regulations. Fortnightly updates to A

sources.name: TJBA - Bahia State Court (Web Service)
sources.notes: Bahia Court of Justice (TJBA) provides a web service endpoint at tjba.jus.br/portal/web-service/ and DataJud API endpoint api_publica_tjba. Full text decisions available via web portal. Investigate we

sources.name: TJCE - Ceara State Court Jurisprudence
sources.notes: Ceara Court of Justice (TJCE) uses E-SAJ system similar to TJSP. DataJud endpoint api_publica_tjce. Free web access, HTML full text.

sources.name: TJGO - Goias State Court Jurisprudence
sources.notes: Goias Court of Justice (TJGO) jurisprudence portal. DataJud endpoint api_publica_tjgo. Free web access, HTML full text.

sources.name: TJPE - Pernambuco State Court Jurisprudence
sources.notes: Pernambuco Court of Justice (TJPE) jurisprudence portal. DataJud endpoint api_publica_tjpe (metadata only). Free web search for full text decisions.

sources.name: TJPR - Parana State Court Jurisprudence
sources.notes: Parana Court of Justice (TJPR) jurisprudencia at tjpr.jus.br/jurisprudencia-inicio. Free web search, full text HTML. GitHub 'courtsbr' community project documents DJE scraping for multiple TJ courts.

sources.name: TJSC - Santa Catarina State Court Jurisprudence
sources.notes: Santa Catarina Court of Justice (TJSC) jurisprudence at busca.tjsc.jus.br/jurisprudencia/. Free web search, full text HTML. courtsbr GitHub project documents the DJE approach.

sources.name: Alberta Legislation (Laws Online Catalogue HTML)
sources.notes: Alberta laws available free in HTML/PDF via Laws Online Catalogue at alberta.ca/laws-online-catalogue. Most Acts, regulations and codes available free. Distinct from CA/AlbertaLaws (Kings Printer at k

sources.name: Manitoba Laws (Continuing Consolidation of Statutes of Manitoba)
sources.notes: Official Manitoba legislation portal at web2.gov.mb.ca/laws. Contains Continuing Consolidation of Statutes of Manitoba (CCSM) from June 2003 onward, and Consolidated Regulations. CanLII mirrors conten

sources.name: New Brunswick Acts and Regulations
sources.notes: New Brunswick consolidated statutes and regulations at gnb.ca. Available bilingual (English/French). Also mirrored on CanLII (canlii.org/en/nb/). HTML access, no API.

sources.name: Newfoundland and Labrador Legislation
sources.notes: Newfoundland and Labrador House of Assembly provides current and consolidated legislation at assembly.nl.ca. Free HTML access. Also mirrored on CanLII (canlii.org/en/nl/).

sources.name: Nova Scotia Legislature - Statutes and Regulations
sources.notes: Nova Scotia Legislature provides Acts and Regulations in HTML/PDF via nslegislature.ca. Open data portal at data.novascotia.ca. CanLII mirror available. HTML scraping.

sources.name: Saskatchewan Legislation (Queen's Printer)
sources.notes: Saskatchewan Queen's Printer free law access at publications.saskatchewan.ca. Consolidated statutes and regulations in PDF and HTML. CanLII also mirrors via canlii.org/en/sk/laws/. No dedicated API. H

sources.name: Cuba National Tax Administration Office Guidance (onat.gob.cu)
sources.notes: Cuba's ONAT (Oficina Nacional de Administración Tributaria) publishes Vector Fiscal (annual tax schedule), resolutions, and guidance at onat.gob.cu under the Ministry of Finance. Tax Portal Tributario

sources.name: Hamburg State Court Decisions (justiz.hamburg.de)
sources.notes: Free HTML case law database from Hamburg judiciary portal (justiz.hamburg.de). Covers OLG, LG, VG, OVG Hamburg decisions from ~2010 onward. Published in cooperation with juris GmbH. Multiple entry poi

sources.name: Hessen State Court Decisions (LaReDa)
sources.notes: LaReDa (Landesrechtsprechungsdatenbank) is the official Hessian court decisions database at lareda.hessenrecht.hessen.de. Supplied by all Hessian court branches; free public access. Decisions anonymiz

sources.name: Mecklenburg-Vorpommern State Court Decisions (MV Justiz)
sources.notes: MV Justiz portal at mv-justiz.de provides court decisions from MV courts incl. Landesverfassungsgericht. Also landesrecht-mv.de (juris cooperation) has case law section alongside legislation. Legislat

sources.name: Niedersachsen State Court Decisions (Nds. Rechtsprechungsdatenbank)
sources.notes: Official Lower Saxony case law database. Maintained by OLG Celle and NI justice portal. Contains published decisions in civil, family, criminal matters. Free for non-commercial use. OLG Celle decision

sources.name: Saarland State Court Decisions
sources.notes: Saarland judiciary and justice ministry portal. Legislation already blocked (DE/Saarland). Case law from Saarland courts published via justice portal and juris cooperation. HTML scraping. Free adminis

sources.name: Thueringen State Court Decisions (Thueringer Rechtsprechungsdatenbank)
sources.notes: Thueringen state law portal at landesrecht.thueringen.de includes court decisions alongside legislation. Historical records from 2010 onward. Legislation (DE/Thueringen) already blocked as javascript

sources.name: Calcutta High Court Judgments Portal
sources.notes: Calcutta High Court (West Bengal, Andaman & Nicobar Islands) at calcuttahighcourt.gov.in. Also covered by IN/HighCourtAWS S3. Verify overlap with IN/HighCourtAWS.

sources.name: Poder Judicial de la Ciudad de Mexico (CDMX Courts)
sources.notes: Mexico City (CDMX) state judicial branch at poderjudicialcdmx.gob.mx. Covers civil, family, and criminal courts. Boletin judicial available. Separate from federal SCJN. Free HTML access. Distinct from

sources.name: Poder Judicial del Estado de Jalisco
sources.notes: Jalisco state courts (second most populous Mexican state). Judicial portal at poderjudicialjalisco.gob.mx. Free HTML access. vLex documents Jalisco case law coverage.

sources.name: Poder Judicial del Estado de Nuevo Leon
sources.notes: Nuevo Leon state courts at pjenl.gob.mx. Consultation systems available. vLex documents NL case law coverage. Free HTML access.

sources.name: Poder Judicial del Estado de Puebla
sources.notes: Puebla state courts (4th most populous Mexican state). State judicial branch portal. Free HTML access.

sources.name: Tribunal de Justicia Administrativa de la Ciudad de Mexico
sources.notes: Mexico City Administrative Justice Tribunal (TJACdMx). Handles CDMX administrative disputes. Has Portal de Justicia Digital. Free HTML access.
